expected_effect: Recover weak calm slices and retail retention without reopening the broad cheap mode that broke earlier recovery and accumulator branches.
expected_failure_signature: If the refill window stays open through renewed toxic flow, the branch replays a weak-slice-only gain or broad cheap-mode arb leakage without promotion.
expected_win_condition: Lift weak calm slices above the raw anchor while keeping anti-arb discipline and the fresh lane above the 480 breakout gate.
hidden_coupling_removed: Passive refill should not be earned and spent through the same calm-memory path as broad recovery rebates.
rationale: Let the non-toxic side refill through a narrow passive auction window that opens only after repeated calm confirmations and closes immediately on renewed stress.
title: Passive refill auction on safe side
why_not_coefficient_retune: This changes where and when safe-side relief can appear relative to the raw tri-channel anchor, instead of scaling the incumbent rebate coefficients.
